name: internal-network-chat
description: MPSTME ACM Internal Network — fullstack real-time organizational messaging platform.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
